scripts.test:smoke: cd .. && make deploy && cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_MODE=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_ACCOUNT_INDEX=0 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts e2e/smoke/app.smoke.spec.ts e2e/smoke/wait-buy.smoke.spec.ts && NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_MODE=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_ACCOUNT_INDEX=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts e2e/smoke/permissions.smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e: cd .. && make deploy && cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_MODE=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_ACCOUNT_INDEX=0 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts e2e/core-e2e/event-lifecycle.spec.ts e2e/core-e2e/wait-buy-order.spec.ts
